topic: Decimal subtraction word problem, choosing correct expression
latex:
Lydia likes to take a $82.25$ mg dose of vitamin C and a $9.25$ mg dose of iron. Which expression below represents how much larger, in mg, the vitamin C dose is than the iron dose?

A. $82.25 \div 9.25$

B. $82.25 \times 9.25$

C. $82.25 + 9.25$

D. $82.25 - 9.25$
